text.title: PostTool Hook Self-Correction Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to emit a hook-config from file patterns + validators.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — List file patterns. Parse `templates/_smoke-test.yaml`. Per pattern record: glob, validator_cmd, timeout_seconds.
Step 2 — Pick validator. Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml per language; defer slow validators to commit gates (r-defer-slow).
Step 3 — Set retry_max + exempt_globs. Default retry_max=3; exempt migrations/auto-generated paths.
Step 4 — Emit settings.json fragment from templates/settings-json-snippet.json; run scripts/validate-posttool-hook-self-correction.py spec.json.
